root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cat > test_expand.c << 'EOF'
> #include <stdio.h>
> #include <stdint.h>
> uint32_t expand(uint32_t key) {
>   return key ^ (key << 16) ^ (key * 12345);
> }
> int main() {
>     for (uint32_t k = 0; k < 10; k++) {
>         printf("%x -> %x\n", k, expand(k));
>     }
>     // check linearity: expand(a^b) vs expand(a)^expand(b)
>     uint32_t a = 0x12345, b = 0x6789a;
>     printf("expand(a^b)=%x expand(a)^expand(b)=%x\n", expand(a^b), expand(a)^expand(b));
>     // multiplication part may break linearity
>     return 0;
> }
> EOF
